title: Tour Guides and Escorts
description: Escort individuals or groups on sightseeing tours or through places of interest, such as industrial establishments, public buildings, and art galleries.

tasks.text: Describe tour points of interest to group members, and respond to questions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Escort individuals or groups on cruises, sightseeing tours, or through places of interest, such as industrial establishments, public buildings, or art galleries.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor visitors' activities to ensure compliance with establishment or tour regulations and safety practices.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct educational activities for school children.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Research various topics, including site history, environmental conditions, and clients' skills and abilities to plan appropriate expeditions, instruction, and commentary.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide directions and other pertinent information to visitors.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Select travel routes and sites to be visited based on knowledge of specific areas.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide for physical safety of groups, performing such activities as providing first aid or directing emergency evacuations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assemble and check the required supplies and equipment prior to departure.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Greet and register visitors, and issue any required identification badges or safety devices.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Distribute brochures, show audiovisual presentations, and explain establishment processes and operations at tour sites.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Drive motor vehicles to transport visitors to establishments and tour site locations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide information about wildlife varieties and habitats, as well as any relevant regulations, such as those pertaining to hunting and fishing.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Teach skills, such as proper climbing methods, and demonstrate and advise on the use of equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collect fees and tickets from group members.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform clerical duties, such as filing, typing, operating switchboards, or routing mail and messages.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Solicit tour patronage and sell souvenirs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Speak foreign languages to communicate with foreign visitors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
